BUILD.bazel.content:
"""Versioned app 'dex' for k8s-a -- generated by defn gen."""

load("//kernel:fmt.bzl", "fmt_test")
load("//kernel:tagged.bzl", "tagged_file")
load("//kernel/interface/app:app.bzl", "app_kustomize_versioned")

app_kustomize_versioned(
    name = "app",
    chart_tgz = "dex-0.24.0.tgz",
    k8s_version = "1.36.1",
    parent_source_path = "tenant/library/app/dex",
    parent_workspace_path = "var/app/dex",
    workspace_path = "var/app/dex/k8s-a",
)

fmt_test(
    name = "build_bazel_fmt",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tool = "buildifier",
)

tagged_file(
    name = "build_bazel_tag",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tags = [
        "bazel",
        "bazel-build",
    ],
)

[fmt_test(
    name = "dispatch_cue_fmt",
    src = src,
    tool = "cue",
) for src in glob(["dispatch.cue"], allow_empty = True)]

[tagged_file(
    name = "dispatch_cue_tag",
    src = src,
    tags = [
        "cue",
        "source",
    ],
) for src in glob(["dispatch.cue"], allow_empty = True)]

"""Kustomize app 'dex' (var render) -- generated by defn gen."""

load("//kernel:fmt.bzl", "fmt_test")
load("//kernel:tagged.bzl", "tagged_file")
load("//kernel/gen-versions:cue.bzl", "CUE_VERSION")

kustomization.yaml.content:
# Generated by defn gen from app.cue + catalog. DO NOT EDIT.
apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
helmGlobals:
  chartHome: charts
helmCharts:
  - name: dex
    version: 0.24.0
    releaseName: dex
    namespace: dex
    valuesInline:
      configSecret:
        create: false
        name: dex
      envFrom:
        - secretRef:
            name: dex-oauth2-proxy-secret
        - secretRef:
            name: dex-argocd-secret
        - secretRef:
            name: dex-coder-secret
      envVars:
        - name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
              name: dex-connector-google
        - name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
              name: dex-connector-google
images:
  - name: ghcr.io/dexidp/dex
    newName: host.k3d.internal:5000/mirror/ghcr.io/dexidp/dex
    newTag: v2.45.1
patches:
  - target:
      kind: Secret
      name: dex-test-no-create
    patch: |
      $patch: delete
      apiVersion: v1
      kind: Secret
      metadata:
        name: dex-test-no-create
